_comment: Per-skill MemPalace memory footprint — the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for skill-scratch retention. archiver.py loads this and applies each skill's decay rules; scaffold-skill.py appends an entry per new skill; scripts/system/checks/check_skill_structure.py verifies every live skill is registered here AND decay-covered (so a new dedicated-wing skill can never silently re-create the wing_jsa accretion). Penny-wing skills use the shared `penny/skills/<skill>-<session_id>` convention (already covered by the `penny/skills/` base prefix rule) and need only convention:penny-wing. Dedicated-wing skills declare their wing, transient scratch room prefixes (matched under that wing), curated (permanent) rooms, and TTL. An empty scratch_prefix ("") means every room in the wing decays except the curated_rooms.
